center.name: Hubert Lynes
center.summary: Hubert Lynes是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括锈色歌百灵、Highland lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The highland lark (Corypha kurrae) is a species of small passerine bird in the lark family Alaudidae found in Africa from Guinea to west Sudan
